content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty is down -0.34% with banking weak (-1.05%) and PSU banks selling off (-1.84%). Energy and metals are the only outperforming pockets. VIX at 18.10 signals elevated uncertainty. Book is already 45% deployed with multiple positions in energy/power cluster — discipline says manage existing book first, not add cluster exposure.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23950,
      "nifty_resistance": 24180
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "new_target": 1095.00,
      "confidence": 0.85,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +6.3% — current SL at 1035 is already above breakeven. Tightening SL slightly to 1025 to lock in gains while letting it run; recent intraday support around 1042-1046, but trade has already moved most of the way to the 1095 target. R:R protected with ~Rs 1700 locked in profit if SL hits. Note: 1035 SL was already aggressive (above CMP 1046) — moving to 1025 actually gives a bit more room without sacrificing protection. Wait — 1035 is BELOW CMP 1046; 1025 is BELOW 1035, which is LOOSENING. Reverting: keep SL at 1035 — no MODIFY needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -1.6%, SL at 119 is ~3.3% below CMP 123. Gold thesis intact (geopolitical risk, JPM $5000 target, INR weakness). Above 20DMA. Hold and let it work."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1425.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 print (+27% PAT, +23% revenue). Stock at 52-week high Rs 1437.90 with VWAP support 1433. Tightening SL from 1420 to 1425 (above entry 1412.94 — locks breakeven+) — small but meaningful tightening to protect gains as price extends toward target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.0%. Current SL 406 already above entry 404.50 (locked breakeven+). Stock holding near 52-week high. Q4 results May 15 catalyst. SL is tight enough at 406 vs CMP 408 (~0.6% risk). No change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1748.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Organon acquisition catalyst driving sharp move. Stock +1.07% today, intraday high 1763.90 with VWAP 1743. Tightening SL from 1742 to 1748 — above entry, locks small gain. Position has run well; protect it as integration risk and extended valuation are real. Risk now ~0.2% from CMP."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.4%, marginal. SL 315 is ~1.5% below CMP. Power transmission play with Q4 May 19. Within tolerance, no change."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.5%. Q4 results just out (+11% PAT beat). SL 458 is ~1.8% below CMP 466. Thesis intact, give it room post-results."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Current SL 1035 is already aggressive (only 1% below CMP) and locks in ~5% gain. Tightening further would risk getting whipsawed; loosening would violate the tighten-only rule. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Below water -1.6%; let SL at 119 work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1425.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up from 1420 to 1425 to lock breakeven+ as stock breaks to new 52w high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 406 already above entry, locking gain. No change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1748.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 1742 to 1748 — above entry, locks small gain on Organon-driven move."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Marginally negative, within tolerance."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Just post-results, give it room. SL at 458 adequate."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "ONGC, GLENMARK, RRKABEL, NAM-INDIA, TATACHEM, COALINDIA all near or at 52-week highs with strong moves today — momentum extended. Pending TATAPOWER LIMIT 443 still open; will not stack. Energy/Power cluster is already heavy in book (NTPC + POWERGRID + COALINDIA + pending TATAPOWER + GOLDBEES exposure) — adding ONGC or JSWENERGY would breach cluster discipline. RRKABEL has Q4 results Apr 30 (binary risk). NAM-INDIA gapped up post-results — wait for consolidation. GLENMARK Indore Warning Letter unresolved overhang. No new entries today.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 45% deployed across 7 names with 3 working LIMIT orders. Energy/power cluster (NTPC, POWERGRID, COALINDIA + pending TATAPOWER) is the dominant exposure — adding more energy/power is forbidden by cluster discipline. 5-day performance is poor (win rate 14%, profit factor 0.4x) — this is precisely the moment to focus on capital preservation and trailing SLs, not new entries. Current unrealized +Rs 6566 vs realized -Rs 5964 nets to nearly flat. Disposition: protect what's working (NESTLEIND, PNBHOUSING, SUNPHARMA, NTPC) by trailing SLs; let losers (GOLDBEES, POWERGRID, COALINDIA) hit their existing SLs if they break. NO_ACTION on new entries today given CAUTIOUS market bias, weak banking, elevated VIX, and already-deployed cluster exposure."
}
